# Notes Template

Use this for loose but still scannable operational notes.

```markdown
# <Item Name> Notes

## Gotchas

- Easy-to-forget behavior.

## Workarounds

- Temporary or permanent workarounds.

## Things to verify later

- Unknown / not documented yet.

## References

- Related path, command, issue, or vendor page.
```

Prefer short sections over one long dump of text.
